settings.label: Logo image
settings.info: Upload your logo here (Theme settings). It appears in the header top left. PNG or SVG with transparency works best.

settings.label: Default share image
settings.info: Shown when someone shares your store link (WhatsApp, iMessage, Facebook, X). Use a wide image about 1200×630px with your branding. Without this, apps may pick any large image from the page.

settings.label: Use product photo when sharing a product page
settings.info: When on, product URLs use that product’s main image in the preview instead of the default share image.

settings.label: Contact page
settings.info: Used for “Contact Us” in the header, footer, and default CTAs. If empty, the theme uses a page with handle “contact”, or /pages/contact.

settings.label: WhatsApp chat link
settings.info: Opens WhatsApp when customers tap “Speak to Us on WhatsApp”, footer “WhatsApp Team”, and product “Enquire on WhatsApp”. Use https://wa.me/234XXXXXXXXX (country code, digits only after wa.me/). If empty, those links use your contact page instead.

settings.label: Let shoppers keep their detected country
settings.info: When off (default), the theme switches the storefront to Nigeria (NG) if Shopify opened the session in another country—fixes “Coming soon / 0 stock” on local theme preview and keeps Nigeria-only stores consistent. Turn on only if you actively sell to multiple countries.

settings.label: General (info)
settings.info: Shown next to Instagram in the footer. The contact form sends to your store contact email (Shopify Admin → Settings → Store details).

settings.label: Orders / invoices
settings.info: Use plural orders@ (not order@). For invoices and order questions. Shopify’s own order emails are set under Settings → Notifications; you can forward copies to this inbox in your mail host.

settings.label: Wholesale
settings.info: Optional reference (not shown in the theme footer). Use on your wholesale page copy or mail clients as needed.

settings.label: Legacy storefront login & register forms
settings.info: Turn on only if your store still uses legacy customer accounts (password login and /account/register on your theme). New stores and upgraded accounts use Shopify-hosted sign-in (email one-time code). Leave off for new customer accounts (recommended).

settings.label: Track order page
settings.info: Used for footer “Track My Order” when the customer is not signed in. Create an Online Store page, set its template to “track-order”, and select it here (or leave empty to use /pages/track-order when a page with handle “track-order” exists).
